risk_title: Security-related work suspensions on critical road infrastructure
risk_summary: Multiple road construction lots have experienced suspensions due to security issues, directly impacting project implementation timelines and progress. Lot 1 was suspended for approximately 17 months (November 2021 to April 2023), and Lot 3 also experienced security-related suspensions, affecting the pace of construction across project components.
evidence_quote: The Lot 1 (Nekempte – Andhode, 86.1 km) works contract commenced on December 20, 2020. However, it was suspended in November 2021 due to security issues and resumed in April 2023... Lot 3 (Agamsa-Bure Section, 84.55 km) works contract also commenced on December 20, 2020, and is progressing after a suspension due to security problems.

risk_title: High political and governance risk rating sustained
risk_summary: The project maintains a 'High' rating for Political and Governance risk, consistent with the last approved rating from July 2024. This sustained high rating indicates ongoing concerns about the political and governance environment affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance: High [Rating at Approval: High] [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 018 - 15 Jul 2024: High] [Proposed Rating: High]

risk_title: High stakeholder risk rating affecting project delivery
risk_summary: The project carries a 'High' rating for Stakeholder risk, indicating significant concerns about stakeholder engagement and management that may affect project implementation and sustainability.
